descriptionEn: The AI copyright war has seen an unexpected new battlefield. This time, the defendants are not AI companies, but record labels.

title: 克劳德·科德之父：“品味”不是人的护城河；
description: 最终，我们教给模型的东西与我们教给孩子的东西是一样的。
titleZh: 克劳德·科德之父：“品味”不是人的护城河；

descriptionZh: 最终，我们教给模型的东西与我们教给孩子的东西是一样的。
descriptionEn: Ultimately, what we teach models is the same thing we teach our children.

title: 录音硬件爆发，四大品类争夺新AI网关，Agent能力成标配
description: AI功能正在融合，硬件能力将决定胜负。

descriptionEn: AI features are converging, and hardware capabilities will determine the winners.

title: AI不合作？
description: 如果你想让不合作的人工智能学会合作，不要给他们写脚本——给他们一个市场。
titleZh: AI不合作？
titleEn: AI won’t cooperate? That’s because they’ve never seen a market economy
descriptionZh: 如果你想让不合作的人工智能学会合作，不要给他们写脚本——给他们一个市场。
descriptionEn: If you want uncooperative AI to learn to cooperate, don’t write them a script—give them a market.

title: 奥特曼寻求宣誓效忠；
description: 当年轻人担心“毕业失业”时，人工智能巨头已经开始使用“全民共享”来平息即将到来的风暴。
titleZh: 奥特曼寻求宣誓效忠；
titleEn: Altman seeks to pledge allegiance; the White House plans to take a stake in OpenAI
descriptionZh: 当年轻人担心“毕业失业”时，人工智能巨头已经开始使用“全民共享”来平息即将到来的风暴。
descriptionEn: While young people worry about “graduating into unemployment,” AI giants have already begun using “universal sharing” to calm the coming storm.

title: ChatGPT 即将进行有史以来最大规模的改革——“仅使用 AI 聊天的时代已经结束”
description: ChatGPT的角色正在被重新定义：它正在逐渐从聊天工具转变为海量流量网关。
titleZh: ChatGPT 即将进行有史以来最大规模的改革——“仅使用 AI 聊天的时代已经结束”
titleEn: ChatGPT is about to undergo its biggest overhaul ever—“The era of using AI only for chatting is over”
descriptionZh: ChatGPT的角色正在被重新定义：它正在逐渐从聊天工具转变为海量流量网关。
descriptionEn: ChatGPT’s role is being redefined: it is gradually transforming from a chat tool into a massive traffic gateway. What truly supports its valuation and paid potential are the programming tools and enterprise-level services hidden behind it.

title: 大科技AI大战高考
description: 产品变得更加有用，但最关键的问题仍未解决。
titleZh: 大科技AI大战高考
titleEn: Big tech AI battles the college entrance exam
descriptionZh: 产品变得更加有用，但最关键的问题仍未解决。
descriptionEn: The products have become more useful, but the most critical issue remains unresolved.

title: 每项任务 280 美元，1000 名工程师教 Claude 编写优秀代码
description: Anthropic 自己的工程师早已不再自己编写代码，但他们却向大约 1,000 名外部工程师支付每项任务 280 美元的费用，让 Claude Code 编写出优秀的代码。
titleZh: 每项任务 280 美元，1000 名工程师教 Claude 编写优秀代码
titleEn: $$280 per task, 1,000 engineers teach Claude to write good code
descriptionZh: Anthropic 自己的工程师早已不再自己编写代码，但他们却向大约 1,000 名外部工程师支付每项任务 280 美元的费用，让 Claude Code 编写出优秀的代码。
descriptionEn: Anthropic’s own engineers have long stopped writing code themselves, yet they pay about 1,000 external engineers $280 per task to hand-hold Claude Code into writing good code. In the end, it’s still humans feeding the frontier models.

title: 诺奖得主联手克劳德，40轮对话证明12年物理学猜想
description: 诺贝尔物理学奖得主乔治·帕里西 (Giorgio Parisi) 将一个长达 12 年未得到证实的物理猜想交给了克劳德。
titleZh: 诺奖得主联手克劳德，40轮对话证明12年物理学猜想
titleEn: Nobel laureate teams up with Claude, proves a 12-year physics conjecture in 40 rounds of dialogue
descriptionZh: 诺贝尔物理学奖得主乔治·帕里西 (Giorgio Parisi) 将一个长达 12 年未得到证实的物理猜想交给了克劳德。
descriptionEn: A physics conjecture that had remained unproven for 12 years was handed to Claude by Nobel Prize-winning physicist Giorgio Parisi. The model essentially derived the complete proof on its own.

title: Codex 与 Claude Code 碰撞，新功能仅领先 11 天
description: 就连斜线指令、技能格式、“做梦”这个名字都重叠了——克劳德·代码和法典都长成了同一张脸。
titleZh: Codex 与 Claude Code 碰撞，新功能仅领先 11 天
titleEn: Codex collides with Claude Code, new features lead by only 11 days
descriptionZh: 就连斜线指令、技能格式、“做梦”这个名字都重叠了——克劳德·代码和法典都长成了同一张脸。
descriptionEn: Even the slash commands, skill formats, and the name “dreaming” overlap—Claude Code and Codex are growing into the same face.

title: Anthropic 联合创始人承认：人工智能正在自我迭代
description: Claude 已经编写了 80% 的代码，目标是在两年内编写 100%！
titleZh: Anthropic 联合创始人承认：人工智能正在自我迭代
titleEn: Anthropic Co-founder Admits: AI Is Iterating Itself
descriptionZh: Claude 已经编写了 80% 的代码，目标是在两年内编写 100%！
descriptionEn: Claude has already written 80% of the code, aiming for 100% within two years! Anthropic’s co-founder sounds the highest alarm, urgently calling for an AI "brake pedal," with Bengio personally backing the call.

title: 科技巨头抢夺AI人才：平均月薪达13万，35岁成抢手货

descriptionZh: 除了程序员之外，其他职业暂时不用担心被AI取代。
descriptionEn: Apart from programmers, other professions need not worry about being replaced by AI for now.

descriptionEn: Richard Sutton, the father of reinforcement learning and a Turing Award winner, hits the nail on the head: the good parts of today’s AI are all old tricks, and the novel parts are all nonsense.
